reviews.comment:
Muy buen lugar para cargar. Las instalaciones impecables. El combustible es un poco mas barato que en otros lugares. Tiene una tienda de regionales muy bien surtida, aunque ese sector es bastante caro. La atención general es buena aunque dista mucho de ser perfecta.

(Translated by Google)
A very good place to fuel up. The facilities are impeccable. Fuel is a little cheaper than other places. It has a well-stocked regional store, although that section is quite expensive. The overall service is good, although far from perfect.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRODdYaFNnEAE

reviews.comment:
LAS MEJORES MEDIALUNAS DE BUENOS AIRES...
ATENCION DEL SALON DEJA MUCHISIMO QUE DESEAR, HE VISTO HASTA MALTRATO A PERSONAS MAYORES...UN DESASTRE!
LIMPIEZA DE BAÑOS....UN 10 !!!!

(Translated by Google)
The best croissants in Buenos Aires...
The service at the shop leaves much to be desired; I've even seen mistreatment of elderly people... a disaster!
Bathroom cleanliness... a 10 out of 10!
